name: SKILL-TECH-SEARCH
description: Deep technical research pipeline with parallel multi-source search. Compares libs, frameworks and tools before you commit to a choice.
when_to_use: Before choosing a library, framework, or technical approach — especially when you are unsure which option is best.

command.claude_ai: Run a deep technical research pipeline on the following topic. Decompose the question into sub-queries, search multiple sources in parallel, evaluate results by recency and authority, then synthesize a structured recommendation with pros/cons and a clear verdict.

author: fluxrow
